title: Plasplug CF104 Plasterboard Fixing Includes 10 Fixings
availability_text: Only 9 left in stock (more on the way).
description: Product Description Plasplugs' original plasterboard fixings are regular-duty, easy to use plasterboard fixings for general use in plasterboard. With a longer grip barrel, they are ideal for plasterboard which is skim-plastered or decorated.Typical applications: Plasterboard fixings, curtain tie-backs, lightweight wall hooks, smoke alarms.Drill size: 6mm.Screw size: No.8 (4.5mm). Supplied in a pack of 10 Founded in 1970, Plasplugs' first product was the General Purpose wall plug, the first plastic plug to sell effectively in the market place. Today, Plasplugs still manufacture plastic plugs, but has extended its portfolio to include fasteners, tiling tools, knives, abrasives, electrical products and power tools. Their mission is to make difficult jobs easier. Renowned for innovation, Plasplugs invests considerably in research and design, frequently launching new products. The newest and most exciting product is the Diamond Wheel Tile Cutter. Its unique water recycling system avoids hazardous water spillage and allows water to be re-used- no more constant refilling. Legal Disclaimer 5 Manufacturer's Description Plasplug Plasterboard Fixings Provides a modern alternative to the traditional mechanical toggle bolts. Screw size No.8 only. Hole size No.12 Drill (6.5mm,1/4in). Card of 10. Box Contains 10 x Plasterboard fixings See more
